Instructor Dashboard: Feature Guide
RISE Rwanda

Insights Tab

Dashboard Summary

Includes

  • Course health & progress indicators
  • Student support indicators
  • AI-generated recommendations
Look forHigh progress with low proficiency means students are advancing without understanding.
InterpretStruggling / On Track / Excelling / N/A combine both metrics. N/A means not enough activity yet.
ActionCheck weekly. Use the unit filter to scope to the current module.

Insights Tab

AI Recommendations

Includes

  • Students who are falling behind
  • Objectives that need attention
  • Suggested instructor actions
Look forSwitch the unit filter to get a recommendation scoped to the current module.
InterpretFlags reset automatically as data improves. A cleared flag confirms your intervention worked.
ActionReview weekly. Cross-check flagged objectives in the Learning Objectives tab before acting.

All Views

Filters

Includes

  • Unit or module
  • Proficiency: Low / Medium / High
  • Progress threshold
  • Score or attempt count
Look forAlways start with the unfiltered view, then narrow down.
InterpretExported CSV reflects current filter state. Clear all filters before a full-dataset export.
ActionPractice Pages: filter Score ≤ 60% for priorities. Students: filter Progress ≤ 30% for outreach.

Insights Tab

Student Progress

Includes

  • Students who have not started work
  • Students who are behind schedule
  • Students who have completed
Look forA cluster stalling at the same point signals a content issue, not individual motivation.
InterpretProgress and proficiency are separate. 100% progress with Medium proficiency means finished but not fully understood.
ActionReview at module midpoint. Pair progress with the Last Interacted date when triaging.

Manage Tab

Student Profiles

Includes

  • Progress %
  • Assessment performance
  • Learning objective performance
  • Activity completion
Look forLook at trajectory over time, not just the current snapshot.
InterpretHigh completion with low proficiency needs help applying knowledge. Low completion with good proficiency is a self-directed learner.
ActionOpen a profile before every outreach or advising conversation.

Insights Tab

Learning Objectives

Includes

  • Challenging objectives
  • Areas needing instruction
  • Course-wide learning patterns
Look forAn objective labelled Medium with a large Low segment still has a significant group struggling.
Interpret'Not enough data' means students have not attempted the linked activities yet.
ActionFilter by current unit. Identify the two weakest objectives and open your next session with those.

Insights Tab

Learning Objective Details

Includes

  • Related sub-objectives
  • Student performance breakdown
  • Related activities
Look forSub-objectives reveal which component of a concept is hardest. Address that specifically.
InterpretLow on assessments but fine on practice is an assessment design issue. Low on both needs more instruction.
ActionAlways expand details before deciding how to respond. The root cause determines the right action.

Insights Tab

Assessments

Includes

  • Completion rates
  • Average score per page
  • Low Scores / Low Progress flags
Look forHigh attempts with low score means students are trying but not succeeding. Prioritise these pages.
InterpretAn empty score column indicates a reading page. Low progress means students have not visited it.
ActionFilter Score ≤ 60% to get a priority list. Open flagged pages as instructor to understand the task.

Insights Tab

Answer Distributions

Includes

  • Common misconceptions
  • Frequently selected wrong answers
  • Topics needing more explanation
Look forOne wrong answer dominating is a shared misconception. Spread evenly means students were guessing.
InterpretA popular near-correct wrong answer means partial understanding. Name the misconception explicitly.
ActionBefore class, find the question with the highest rate of the same wrong answer. Start your session there.

Manage Tab

Email & Student Outreach

Includes

  • Students falling behind
  • Students inactive for 7+ days
  • Students not completing assessments
Look forPrioritise students with multiple risk indicators: low progress, old Last Interacted date, no submissions.
InterpretNo reply does not mean disengaged. Connectivity barriers are common, and the data still prepares you for an in-person conversation.
ActionReference specific data in your message. Frame it as support, not accountability.

Manage Tab

Data Export

Includes

  • Department reporting
  • Course evaluation
  • Custom analysis workflows
ExportClick the Download CSV button on any table to export its data as a spreadsheet.
Look forClear all filters before exporting if you need the full dataset for a report.
InterpretA single end-of-course export shows the final state only. Export at each module end to track trends over time.
ActionLabel exports with cohort name and date. Store in a shared folder for programme coordinators.
